_comment: International fallback registry — ALWAYS present for any region without a curated registry (docs/10 §6). Not in the SR-2 launch-gate set (PK/DE/UK), but advisors still verify before relying on it. Never NEDA (CLAUDE.md #7). All contact values stay TODO-VERIFY until advisor sign-off.
